2026-02-27T17:26:53.9053587Z   with TestInfo from @azure-tools/test-recorder, update

2026-02-27T17:26:53.9055676Z   chain list. The implementation now tries 7 credential types, not just
2026-02-27T17:26:53.9056162Z   EnvironmentCredential and ManagedIdentityCredential. Added the
2026-02-27T17:26:53.9056647Z   missing WorkloadIdentityCredential, VisualStudioCodeCredential,
2026-02-27T17:26:53.9057084Z   AzureCliCredential, AzurePowerShellCredential, and
